candidate_summary.summary: Early-career data engineer in the Netherlands with one internship plus strong graduate-level and project-based data engineering work. Strongest on Python, SQL, Spark, Databricks, Airflow, Azure, ETL/ELT, and warehouse-oriented analytics engineering. Good fit for junior data engineering, analytics engineering, Python-heavy backend/data workflow roles, and traineeships. Not a strong fit for senior ownership, deep architecture leadership, or jobs that require fluent Dutch.

language_signals.notes: English is fluent. Dutch is still basic and should be treated as a blocker when the JD explicitly requires Dutch.

candidate_summary.summary: Early-career software engineer with roughly two years of meaningful professional engineering experience across backend APIs, product-facing web features, authentication workflows, automation tooling, and large-scale data pipelines. Strongest on Java, Python, SQL, Django REST, React/TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and building reliable systems that support product workflows. Good fit for junior-to-mid backend, backend-leaning software engineering, Java/Python API, and implementation-heavy integration roles. Generic software or full-stack roles are only credible when backend/API ownership is clearly central. Not a strong fit for senior architecture ownership, people management, frontend-only specialization, research-heavy machine learning, or Dutch-required roles.

language_signals.notes: English is strong. No evidence of working Dutch, so Dutch-required roles should be treated strictly.
